EEGReference: Mastoid reference electrodes A1 and A2 placed on opposite lateral mastoid bones (both recorded as data channels).
EEGPlacementScheme: Modified international 10-20 system: 30 scalp electrodes plus mastoid references A1, A2 (classic nomenclature; T3/T4/T5/T6 = T7/T8/P7/P8).
ManufacturersModelName: Scan SynAmps2 Express (the source paper also refers to a Scan NuAmps Express system)
TaskDescription: Event-related lane-departure sustained-attention driving task (designed for ~90 min; actual recording durations vary) in a VR driving simulator on a six-degree-of-freedom Stewart motion platform. Night-time straight four-lane highway at 100 km/h; random left/right lane drifts to which the participant counter-steers.
Instructions: Keep the car cruising in the centre of the third lane and steer it back to the centre as quickly as possible whenever it drifts; use the steering wheel only (no accelerator or brake).
